stories.headline: India secures massive $30B data center investment boosting global AI and cloud infrastructure

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: India’s digital infrastructure journey is gathering remarkable momentum. AirTrunk has announced plans to invest around Rs. 3 lakh crore ($30 billion) in India, and develop 5 GW of data centre capacity.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Japan is converting used cooking oil into sustainable aviation fuel to power greener flights. Cuba battles blackouts, shortages and a worsening economic crisis. India's economy grew 7.7%, but inflation and oil prices remain major concerns

stories.headline: Ukraine strikes Russian oil refinery 2000km deep in Tyumen

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Incredible night for Ukraine, taking out Russian oil infrastructure and military targets from St Petersburg to the Urals. 2000km from Ukraine, in Tyumen, the Antipinsky Oil Refinery, capacity 9 million tons/year burns after early morning strikes.

stories.headline: Zelenskyy marks 82nd anniversary of D-Day, links to Ukraine's fight against Russia

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Today is the 82nd anniversary of D-Day – the Allied landings in Normandy... We are working to make it happen again today... Glory to Ukraine!

stories.headline: DC Reflecting Pool restored under Trump

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: We took a family trip to the Lincoln Monument tonight to check out the new reflecting pool. Absolutely stunning. DC is so beautiful again, just in time for our Nation’s 250th.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The water is ON, the Reflecting Pool is reflecting, and D.C. is looking better than ever. We are so back. THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: More than half of the publicly identified donors to President Trump’s White House ballroom project have won new or expanded federal contracts worth more than $50 billion.

stories.headline: Bitcoin integrates with global economy, currencies, credit, securities, and institutions.
stories.body: Bitcoin Capitalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by integrating with the global economy: currencies, credit, securities, companies, banks, institutions, governments, families, and individuals. Bitcoin is an open monetary network for everyone.

stories.headline: Bitcoin long-term chart shows broken uptrend and potential head-and-shoulders top
stories.body: Look at this long-term Bitcoin chart. The uptrend off the Dec. 2022 low is broken. There's a huge head-and-shoulders top forming. The most likely resolution is a retest of the longer-term uptrend off the Dec. 2018 low. If it holds, that puts a bottom between $25,000 and $27,000.

stories.headline: SpaceX would need 600x growth to justify its $1.75T IPO valuation.
stories.body: SpaceX $SPCX needs to grow 600x over the next decade to justify its $1.75 Trillion IPO Valuation 🚨 No company has ever come close in the history of capitalism 🤯

stories.headline: Demonstration of a quick quesadilla cooking technique on a griddle.
stories.body:
Life Changing Quesadillas in Exactly 60 Seconds.

(Well, it'll take you longer than that, but I show you how to do it in 60 seconds)

Ingredients:

- El Viajero Shredded Queso Quesadilla
- Tillamook Medium Cheddar
- Legit Mexican tortillas made with lard
- Actual lard (I cooked hamburger at the same time and spread some of the oil on the tortilla as it was cooking, forgot to video that part) 
- Kosher salt to finish (go easy on it, I put on a little too much)

stories.headline: AI-assisted vulnerability discovery harness forked for Codex-first automated research
stories.body:
I forked Anthropic’s new vuln-discovery harness and made it Codex-first.

Recon → Find → Verify → Triage → Report → Patch

Sandboxed agents find bugs, prove them with crashing PoCs, dedupe, write exploitability reports, and validate patches.

https://github.com/zeroxjf/defending-code-reference-harness-codex

stories.headline: Surf punk video highlighting territorial beach culture in Southern California
stories.body:
The Surf Punks - "My Beach" (1982)

Surf punk is a pretty reactionary subgenre. It's highly territorial, it's all about making the non-locals go away so they can't talk to the chicks and party with them on the beach. Very good attitude, I approve.

stories.headline: National Weather Service forecasts classic June gloom for Southern California this week.
stories.body: A series of low pressure systems will bring cloud cover to Southern California communities this week as part of a “classic June gloom” before temperatures rise later on next week, the National Weather Service says. https://ktla.com/weather/classic-june-gloom-in-store-for-southern-california-before-eventual-warming-trend-nws/

stories.headline: Runbeck whistleblower confirms illegal ballots inserted in 2022 Arizona election
stories.body:
Here it is:

RUNBECK WHISTLEBLOWER:

CONFIRMS BEYOND THE SHADOW OF A DOUBT,

That Runbeck printed approximately 300,000 ballots and illegally inserted them into the tally—not coming from drop boxes, not coming from polling locations, but instead being brought in by employees—for the Arizona 2022 General Election, effectively overthrowing the state government of Arizona.

📝Katie Hobbs and her co-conspirator, Adrian Fontes, rigged three elections in a row.

stories.headline: Russian state media amplifies Candace Owens conspiracy theories against Erika Kirk
stories.body:
Russian state propaganda previously attacked @MrsErikaKirk by amplifying @RealCandaceO's conspiracy theories.

Now Russia is going STRAIGHT at her. Why? Because Erika Kirk represents pro-Western Christianity. Russia & Candace represent authoritarian Tsarist Christianity.

Russia has been trying to influence TPUSA in 2018. It failed. Now, they have to destroy it.

And it's a proxy battle in the broader ideological war.
